issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and other workflows
issues.desc: HAs and TCs were receiving duplicate tasks across multiple workflows, including post-referral and sale pending workflows, for Loan Simple leads. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot, which caused leads to qualify for multiple workflow branches simultaneously. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks to avoid double-processing.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks continued firing after deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral weekly check-in tasks even after deals had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow's suppression filters were not correctly excluding these terminal deal stages. A tweak to the workflow filters was applied to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral tasks that fired on deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow did not re-enroll deals flipped back from Committed to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed after a contract fall-through, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger to collect closing info. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was missing from the workflow's re-enrollment criteria. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were re-set to Offer Accepted during the impact window to ensure TC closing info tasks are assigned.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on a deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer change was made on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the updated one. The correct LO was reflected in Dash but not propagating to HubSpot workflow email templates. Luis investigated and resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: For any deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually verify and resend any automated agent or client emails to ensure they reflect the correct loan officer.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals that were updated to the Offer Accepted stage were not triggering TC workflow enrollment, meaning TCs received no tasks for closing coordination. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and a fix was confirmed, though the exact root cause was not publicly stated. Deals moved to Offer Accepted before the fix were not retroactively enrolled.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were moved to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1 to ensure TCs receive the appropriate closing tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not triggering tasks for referrals accepted around March 18
issues.desc: A post-referral workflow failed to generate any tasks after a referral was made and accepted on March 18th. The root cause was an error in how data was being pulled, preventing the workflow from filtering correctly. The issue was confirmed fixed and escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any referrals accepted around March 18 into the post-referral workflow and manually assign any tasks that should have been created during the impact window.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent at Offer Accepted stage before closing info is available, missing credit amount
issues.desc: An SMS notifying buyers of their buyer credit amount was being sent during the Offer Accepted stage before closing information had been submitted, resulting in the credit amount being blank. The SMS should only fire at the Sale Pending stage once the credit amount is calculable. It was confirmed to be a Dash-triggered communication and was escalated to the product team for correction.
issues.workaround: For buyers who received the incomplete buyer credit SMS during the Offer Accepted stage, manually send a follow-up communication at the Sale Pending stage with the correct credit amount once closing information is submitted.
